steps.title: Interpret the ordered pair
steps.content: For $y=f(x)$, an ordered pair $(x,y)$ means the function output at that $x$ value is the corresponding $y$ value.

steps.title: Read the function value
steps.content: The point $(6,4)$ satisfies $y=f(x)$. Therefore, when $x=6$, the output is $4$, so $$f(6)=4$$ The answer is A.
